subject: RE: URGENT: Invoice INV-2026-017 requires immediate payment
body:
Hi,

I want to formally dispute this invoice. The licensing fee calculation appears to be based on the wrong tier. We have 12 users, not 20. Please review and reissue.

Regards,
James Fletcher

subject: RE: Your account is overdue — Invoice INV-2026-009
body:
Hello,

Thank you for the reminder. We are currently processing payments for this period. Our internal approval process has been delayed due to a board review. We expect to release payment by 30 May.

Apologies for the inconvenience.

Amanda Walsh
Walsh Civil Engineering

subject: RE: Your account is overdue — Invoice INV-2026-005
body:
Hi there,

Sorry for the delay on this one. We've had a slow month. I'll have this sorted by next Friday — 30 May.

David

subject: RE: Friendly reminder — Invoice INV-2026-011 is overdue
body:
Hi,

I'm looking into this. Can you please resend the breakdown of hours? I don't have a copy of the original scope.

Thanks,
James

subject: Out of Office: RE: Overdue Notice
body:
Thank you for your email. James Fletcher is currently out of the office until 2 June 2026. For urgent matters, please contact our accounts department at accounts@fletcherit.com.au.

This is an automated response.

subject: RE: Invoice INV-2026-023 — Query
body:
Hi,

We have a query regarding invoice INV-2026-023. The amount doesn't match our purchase order PO-WC-2026-008. Can you please clarify? We cannot process payment until this is resolved.

Thanks,
Walsh Civil Accounts

subject: Payment plan request
body:
Hi,

I know this invoice is very overdue. The business has been tough. Would you be open to a payment plan — maybe $2,000 per month? I can get the first payment to you by end of week.

Hope we can work something out,
David

subject: RE: Friendly reminder — Invoice INV-2026-024
body:
Hi,

Apologies — this slipped through. I'll process it today.

Sarah

subject: AI Call Transcript — Invoice INV-2026-013
body: AI caller: Hi, I'm an AI accounts receivable assistant calling on behalf of Refresh The Web. This is an automated and recorded business call regarding invoice INV-2026-013…
transcript:
AI caller: Hi, I'm an AI accounts receivable assistant calling on behalf of Refresh The Web. This is an automated and recorded business call regarding an outstanding invoice.

Contact: Hello?

AI caller: Good morning — am I speaking with David from Harbour Kitchen?

Contact: Yes, speaking.

AI caller: Great, David. I'm calling on behalf of the Refresh The Web accounts team regarding invoice INV-2026-013 for $8,400.00, which is currently 95 days overdue. Is now a good time for a quick follow-up?

Contact: Yeah, sure. Look, I know it's overdue. Things have been tough.

AI caller: I understand completely, David. Would you be able to give us an expected payment date? We're happy to work with you on this.

Contact: I can probably get you something by end of next week — maybe Friday the 5th of June?

AI caller: Thank you, David. I'll record that you've committed to a payment by Friday 5 June. Our team will follow up if we don't hear from you by then. Is there anything else I can help with today?

Contact: No, that's fine. Thanks.

AI caller: Thank you for your time, David. Have a great day.

---
Outcome: Promise to Pay — 5 June 2026
Sentiment: Cooperative
Escalation required: No
Automation hold: Yes (promise to pay recorded)

subject: AI Call Transcript — Invoice INV-2026-009
body: AI caller: Hi, I'm an AI accounts receivable assistant calling on behalf of Refresh The Web. This is an automated and recorded business call regarding invoice INV-2026-009…
transcript:
AI caller: Hi, I'm an AI accounts receivable assistant calling on behalf of Refresh The Web. This is an automated and recorded business call regarding invoice INV-2026-009.

[No answer — voicemail system detected]

AI caller (voicemail): Hi, this is an automated message from the Refresh The Web accounts team regarding an outstanding invoice. Please contact us on our accounts line or reply to your most recent invoice email at your earliest convenience. Thank you.

---
Outcome: Voicemail
Sentiment: N/A
Escalation required: No
Automation hold: No

subject: AI Call Transcript — Invoice INV-2026-017
body: AI caller: Hi, I'm an AI accounts receivable assistant calling on behalf of Refresh The Web. This is an automated and recorded business call regarding invoice INV-2026-017…
callOutcome: Dispute raised — escalate to accounts team
transcript:
AI caller: Hi, I'm an AI accounts receivable assistant calling on behalf of Refresh The Web. This is an automated and recorded business call regarding invoice INV-2026-017.

Contact: Oh, yes. Actually I'm glad someone called. We've already emailed about this — the invoice amount is wrong.

AI caller: I'm sorry to hear there's a discrepancy, James. Could you briefly explain the concern so I can flag it for the accounts team?

Contact: The licensing fee is calculated on 20 users but we only have 12. It's been wrong since the start. I sent an email weeks ago and no one got back to us.

AI caller: Thank you for letting me know, James. I'll flag this call as a dispute and escalate it directly to our accounts team for review. They'll be in touch within 1–2 business days to resolve the calculation and issue a corrected invoice if needed. I'll also make sure to pause any further automated reminders while this is reviewed.

Contact: Yeah, please do that. I don't want any more reminders until it's sorted.

AI caller: Absolutely understood. I've noted the dispute and the automation will be paused. Thank you for your time, James. Our accounts team will be in touch shortly.

---
Outcome: Dispute raised — escalate to accounts team
Sentiment: Frustrated
Escalation required: Yes
Automation hold: Yes (dispute in progress)
